---
title: "02_eda"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load interim data
#--------------------------------------------------

clinical_master <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "clinical_master.rds"))
expr_t <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "expression_clean.rds"))
meth_t <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "methylation_clean.rds"))
merged_clinical_expression <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_expression.rds"))
merged_clinical_methylation <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_methylation.rds"))
merged_clinical_multiomic <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_multiomic.rds"))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Cohort sizes
#--------------------------------------------------

cohort_summary <- tibble(
  cohort = c("clinical_master", "expression_only", "methylation_only", "multiomic"),
  n_rows = c(
    nrow(clinical_master),
    nrow(merged_clinical_expression),
    nrow(merged_clinical_methylation),
    nrow(merged_clinical_multiomic)
  )
)

cohort_summary
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Outcome balance
#--------------------------------------------------

merged_clinical_expression %>%
  count(survival_500, .drop = FALSE)

merged_clinical_methylation %>%
  count(survival_500, .drop = FALSE)

merged_clinical_multiomic %>%
  count(survival_500, .drop = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Basic clinical missingness
#--------------------------------------------------

clinical_master %>%
  summarise(
    missing_vital_status = mean(is.na(vital_status)),
    missing_days_to_death = mean(is.na(days_to_death)),
    missing_days_to_follow_up = mean(is.na(days_to_follow_up)),
    missing_primary_diagnosis = mean(is.na(primary_diagnosis)),
    missing_smoking_status = mean(is.na(smoking_status)),
    missing_asbestos_exposure = mean(is.na(asbestos_exposure_type))
  )
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Expression variance summary
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_feature_cols <- setdiff(
  names(expr_t),
  c("sample_submitter_id", "case_submitter_id")
)

expr_var <- expr_t %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(expr_feature_cols), var, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "gene", values_to = "variance")

summary(expr_var$variance)
sum(expr_var$variance == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Expression PCA
#--------------------------------------------------

top_expr_genes <- expr_var %>%
  arrange(desc(variance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 1000) %>%
  pull(gene)

expr_pca_input <- expr_t %>%
  select(all_of(top_expr_genes)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

expr_pca <- prcomp(expr_pca_input, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)

expr_pca_df <- as_tibble(expr_pca$x[, 1:2]) %>%
  bind_cols(expr_t %>% select(sample_submitter_id, case_submitter_id)) %>%
  left_join(
    clinical_master %>% select(case_submitter_id, survival_500),
    by = "case_submitter_id"
  )

ggplot(expr_pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = survival_500)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(title = "Expression PCA")
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 7. Methylation variance summary
#--------------------------------------------------

meth_feature_cols <- setdiff(
  names(meth_t),
  c("sample_submitter_id", "case_submitter_id")
)

meth_var <- meth_t %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(meth_feature_cols), var, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "probe", values_to = "variance")

summary(meth_var$variance)
sum(meth_var$variance == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Methylation PCA
#--------------------------------------------------

#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Methylation PCA
#--------------------------------------------------

meth_var_clean <- meth_var %>%
  filter(is.finite(variance), !is.na(variance), variance > 0)

top_meth_probes <- meth_var_clean %>%
  arrange(desc(variance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 1000) %>%
  pull(probe)

meth_pca_input <- meth_t %>%
  select(all_of(top_meth_probes)) %>%
  select(where(~ all(is.finite(.)) && !any(is.na(.)))) %>%
  as.data.frame()

dim(meth_pca_input)
sum(!sapply(meth_t %>% select(all_of(top_meth_probes)), function(x) all(is.finite(x)) && !any(is.na(x))))

meth_pca <- prcomp(meth_pca_input, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)

meth_pca_df <- as_tibble(meth_pca$x[, 1:2]) %>%
  bind_cols(meth_t %>% select(sample_submitter_id, case_submitter_id)) %>%
  left_join(
    clinical_master %>% select(case_submitter_id, survival_500),
    by = "case_submitter_id"
  )

ggplot(meth_pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = survival_500)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(title = "Methylation PCA")
```
